data.title: ArcLight Capital Partners appoints Angelo Acconcia as President to oversee investment activities. - 56 characters
data.description: Industry expert Angelo Acconcia has been appointed by ArcLight Capital Partners, LLC as the leader in charge of managing the firm's investment, fundraising, and operational endeavors. The announcement was made in Boston on August 7, 2025. ArcLight, a prominent infrastructure investor, has selected Acconcia, a seasoned professional with extensive experience in both private equity and the energy sector. This decision marks a strategic move for ArcLight as they aim to enhance their business activities under Acconcia's guidance.

data.title: Brain Navi's NaoTrac conducts first surgeries in Spain with partner Palex Healthcare, marking a significant milestone.
data.description: In a significant development, Brain Navi has expanded its operations to Spain. The successful initiation took place on August 7, 2025. This expansion is a result of a key partnership with Palex Healthcare, marking the beginning of a series of collaborations. The commendable reputation of Palex Healthcare has played a vital role in achieving this milestone.

data.title: Introducing ADLINK cExpress-R8: powered by AMD Ryzen™ Embedded 8000 series for up to 40 TOPS Edge AI with 8-core, 16-thread processing and RDNA™ 3 graphics.
data.description: The AMD Ryzen™ Embedded 8000 Series, equipped with RDNA™ 3 and XDNA™ technology, provides a maximum of 40 TOPS for Edge AI. These processors offer 8 cores and 16 threads for robust performance. With AMD RDNA™ 3 graphics, users can experience enhanced multitasking capabilities and stunning visuals.

data.title: Shamrock Capital buys Penta Group. Investment aims to drive growth in stakeholder communications. Los Angeles, Aug 7, 2025.
data.description: Shamrock Capital, a renowned Los Angeles-based investment firm specializing in media, has announced an investment to propel Penta's growth and enhance their capabilities in adapting to the evolving communications landscape. The investment aims to accelerate Penta's next phase of development. The investment amount has not been disclosed. This strategic move highlights Shamrock's confidence in Penta's potential in meeting the demands of the dynamic communication sector. Timestamped on August 7, 2025, this partnership signifies a significant step towards achieving mutual success and innovation in the industry.

data.title: CIQ launches Warewulf Pro for HPC clusters, providing turnkey solution from open source, RENO, Nev., Aug. 7, 2025.
data.description: Warewulf Pro, an evolved version of the dominant open-source cluster toolkit, has transitioned from a community-based tool to an enterprise-level solution. This fully supported, turnkey system is designed for performance-intensive computing needs. Released on August 7, 2025, in Reno, Nevada, this development marks a significant shift in the capabilities of the existing platform. CIQ, the primary support and services partner for Rocky Linux and renowned in the industry, has spearheaded this advancement. Their commitment to providing robust solutions is reflected in Warewulf Pro's enhanced features and support services, setting a new standard in the field. This evolution signifies the convergence of cutting-edge technology with comprehensive assistance to meet the demands of high-performance computing.

data.title: Big Data in Healthcare market to reach $540 billion by 2035 from $78 billion in 2025, with a CAGR of 19.20%. Leading players mentioned.
data.description: The research report titled "Big Data in Healthcare Market Trends and Forecast 2025-2035" has been recently included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's collection. The global market for big data in healthcare is projected to increase from USD 78 billion in 2025 to USD 540 billion by 2035, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 19.20% over the forecast period. The report covers various aspects such as components, types of hardware and software, services, deployment options, application areas, healthcare verticals, end users, economic statuses, geographic regions, and key players in the industry.

data.title: Skechers introduces hands-free AERO Series Slip-ins making running easier and more convenient.
data.description: In Los Angeles, Skechers has enhanced its Skechers AERO Series running footwear by incorporating the exclusive Slip-ins® technology. This addition aims to make it effortless for individuals to quickly slip on the shoes and move swiftly with ease, style, and comfort. Earlier this year, the brand introduced the Skechers AERO Series with cutting-edge features for runners of varying abilities. Now, they have integrated their well-known Skechers Hands Free Slip-ins® technology into the range, simplifying the process of getting in those miles.

data.title: Cushman & Wakefield unveils new GHG emissions targets, aiming for higher sustainability standards.NYSE: CWK. #CRE #Ambition.
data.description: Cushman & Wakefield, a prominent global commercial real estate services company publicly traded on NYSE under the symbol CWK, has disclosed its enhanced science-based greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions reduction goals. The newly revised targets set higher benchmarks for climate ambition across the firm's operations and the numerous client properties it oversees globally. These updated objectives not only establish more aggressive emissions reduction standards but also introduce a detailed approach for tackling the Scope 3 emissions that constitute a substantial portion of its value chain.

data.title: Fly Play hf. Q2 2025 results: operating costs at USD 71.0 mil, cash USD 11.9 mil, subscription commitments USD 20 mil, carried 361k passengers, net loss USD -15.3 mil, leisure capacity up 15%, EBIT USD -9.2 mil, on-time performance 91.3%, 10 aircraft in fleet. Shifting to leisure routes.
data.description: Fly Play hf. reported strong Q2 operations in 2025 with higher TRASK and lower adjusted CASK, despite adverse currency movements and maintenance delays impacting results. The company had USD 11.9 million in cash at the end of Q2, along with secured subscription commitments of USD 20 million. Operating costs decreased to USD 71.0 million, and PLAY carried 361k passengers, down from 442k in 2024. Net loss was USD -15.3 million, and leisure capacity rose by 15% in Q2 2025. The company had 10 aircraft in its fleet but operated the equivalent of 8 from Keflavík in Q2. On-time performance was at 91.3%.PLAY had 31 destinations in its route network during Q2 2025, showing a decrease from the previous year.

data.title: OpenAI's Sam Altman confirms GPT-5 is coming. A 7-second clip of GPT-5 evolving from GPT-4o has caused excitement in the AI community.
data.description: The AI community is abuzz over a short 7-second video clip where GPT-40 transforms into GPT-50. This unexpected development has sparked excitement and speculation in the community. The video has garnered significant attention, with discussions focusing on the implications and potential advancements that a transition to GPT-50 could bring. The swift evolution showcased in the clip has left many in awe and eager to see what developments may follow. Overall, the video has generated curiosity and anticipation within the AI community regarding the future possibilities with GPT-50.

data.title: NYC mayoral candidate Joseph Hernandez signs no-new-tax pledge, proposes $15.2B budget reform plan. $4,000+ return per taxpayer.
data.description: Today, independent mayoral candidate Joseph Hernandez from New York City revealed his unique stance as the only candidate pledging not to introduce any new taxes. Hernandez's proposed plan aims to give back over $4,000 per taxpayer by eliminating unnecessary spending rather than cutting essential services. This announcement was made on August 7, 2025, in both New York City and Washington. Hernandez stands out from his opponents by prioritizing taxpayer protection through financial efficiency measures.
